authority: Refer to OECD CRS jurisdiction page for competent authority details
reporting_deadline: Typically 30 June or 31 July following the reporting calendar year - verify with local authority
submission_method: Local tax authority portal, OECD CRS XML Schema v2.0

INVESTMENT_B: Trust interests and private structure accounts
INSURANCE: Cash value insurance and annuity contracts

new_individual.procedure: Self-certification at account opening: name, address, TIN(s), jurisdiction(s) of tax residence, date of birth.

pre_existing_individual_lower_value.procedure: Residence address test using documentary evidence on file. Electronic search for indicia.

pre_existing_individual_high_value.procedure: Enhanced review: full electronic and paper file search, relationship manager inquiry.

new_entity.procedure: Self-certification for entity classification and controlling persons for Passive NFFEs.

pre_existing_entity.procedure: Classify entity using existing AML/KYC documentation.

account: Balance or value at year end
income_investment: Total gross amounts paid or credited
income_insurance: Cash surrender value or amount paid out

derived_fields: Entity classification: Active NFFE, Passive NFFE, Reporting FI, Non-Reporting FI
Controlling person identification and TIN linkage
Undocumented account flag and reason code

thresholds.new_accounts: No financial threshold - all new accounts reviewed

key_dates.reporting_deadline: Verify with local competent authority - typically mid-year following reporting year

penalties.general: Penalties for non-compliance vary by jurisdiction. Consult local authority guidance.

local_notes: Follows OECD CRS standard. Refer to local competent authority guidance for jurisdiction-specific adaptations.
Use the Fetch Latest Guidance option for the most current local rules.
Verify reporting deadlines annually as these can be extended by local authority notice.
